name: Roast Turkey with Wild Rice Stuffing.
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare wild rice according to package directions.
2. Dissolve 3 teaspoons of bouillon in water before adding the rice.
3. Preheat oven to 325°F.
4. In a medium skillet, cook celery and green pepper in butter until tender.
5. Dissolve the remaining bouillon in hot water.
6. In a large bowl, combine rice, vegetables, bouillon liquid, stuffing mix, and poultry seasoning; mix well.
7. Season turkey with salt and pepper.
8. Stuff neck and body cavity loosely; secure with twine.
9. Place breast side up on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
10. Brush the turkey with melted butter.
11. Roast according to label directions.
12. Transfer any extra stuffing to a well-greased 1-quart baking dish, cover, and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
